description_long: This is a tall, rectangular filing cabinet with a matte black finish, featuring a single visible drawer on the upper section and a recessed open space below. The top surface is flat, suitable for placing small items, and there is a circular knob handle on the drawer front for easy access. The cabinet's design is minimalist, with no visible label holders or decorative elements, emphasizing functionality. The sides and back are plain, while the front is defined by the drawer and the open compartment beneath it. The cabinet appears to be constructed primarily from metal, likely steel, with a plastic or metal handle. Its robust build suggests it is intended for secure storage in urban environments such as offices or garages.
description: A tall, matte black filing cabinet with a single upper drawer featuring a round knob and a large open compartment below. The design is minimalist and functional, with a flat top and sturdy construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the solid face with the upper drawer and its round knob, and the open compartment below.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the open compartment and the flat, featureless side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back and the round knob of the drawer protruding slightly.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the open compartment and the flat side panel.
